english_text: Heart, Intellect — SUBMISSION (upward) — CONTENT — I have submitted
alt_text: Pedagogical scene of the 'tranquil soul': a Quran at top with red arrows pointing down to Heart (قلب) and Intellect (عقل); a yellow human head labelled 'CONTENT' says 'I have submitted'. A red SUBMISSION arrow points upward.
notes: Diagrammatic portrait of nafs al-Mutma'inna — content after submission to Quranic guidance.
